name: MMC Direct — Public instant-estimate + voice concierge (Phase 1)
description: Public no-auth /estimate flow: voice/text discovery -> deterministic indicative estimate from MMC's own rate table -> signup-gated PDF download / formal-quote request. SCRUM-220.

env_vars.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
env_vars.description: BYOK ElevenLabs key for the voice discovery concierge (@caistech/elevenlabs-convai). Feature degrades to text-only search if absent.

env_vars.name: NODE_AUTH_TOKEN
env_vars.description: GitHub PAT (read:packages) to install @caistech/elevenlabs-convai from GitHub Packages. Repo .npmrc references ${NODE_AUTH_TOKEN} — the Vercel env var and local shell var MUST use this exact name, not GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN.

env_vars.name: PLATFORM_TRUST_SUPABASE_URL
env_vars.description: trustGate rate-limit backend (already used elsewhere in repo). Confirm present on Vercel.

env_vars.name: PLATFORM_TRUST_SERVICE_KEY
env_vars.description: Service key for the platform-trust backend (rate limiting / metering / audit on the public estimate endpoint).

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Used by callModel() for the cheap query-parse step (freeform -> structured intent). Already present.

env_vars.name: TURNSTILE_SECRET
env_vars.description: DEFERRED. Cloudflare Turnstile bot challenge — only needed if scripted abuse appears (per-request cost is trivial via deterministic estimate + trustGate).

external_setup.title: Install @caistech/elevenlabs-convai
external_setup.description: Voice concierge primitive. Requires GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN with read:packages and the @caistech registry line in .npmrc.
steps: Set NODE_AUTH_TOKEN (read:packages PAT) in the shell env AND in Vercel (all environments)

external_setup.title: Provision the ElevenLabs ConvAI discovery agent via API
external_setup.description: Create the discovery concierge agent programmatically (never via dashboard) per the portfolio provision-via-API rule. Persona + opening line per voice-config.
steps: Run the setup-product-credentials script step that calls the ConvAI create-agent API
Store the returned agent_id in env / config for the concierge surface
